calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL MARTIN FERSTER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS REPRESENTED BY MR. WILLIAM A. TALMAGE OF WOLF REALTY WHO ALSO IS PRESENT; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY MARY ANN MEANY, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT ALICIA BOOKER, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD:
A "PAY AND STAY" SETTLEMENT FOR THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2060 O'FARRELLL STREET, #108, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115 IS REACHED; THE TOTAL AMOUNT DUE FROM THE DEFENDANT IS $7,913.00, WHICH IS A COMBINATION OF BACK DUE RENTS AND ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS; ATTORNEY FEES AND COST ARE A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,605.00. DEFENDANT PAYS TO PLAINTIFF THIS DAY A SUM OF $966.00 THIS DAY IN OPEN COURT; THE AMOUNT OF $450.00 IS DUE BY DEFENDANT ON OR BEFORE MAR-31-2006; ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN AMOUNT OF $1,605.00 IS DUE AFTER RENT IS PAID FOR RENT DUE FOR APRIL 2006 WHICH IS DUE BY APR-01-2006; ADDITIONAL AMOUNT OF $209.42 TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF FOR FIRST INSTALLMENT BY APR-15-2006. A GRACE PERIOD OF FIVE DAYS FOR RENT PAYMENT IS ALLOWED; RENT IS TO BE PAID BETWEEN THE FIRST AND THE FIFTH DATE OF EACH MONTH WHEN DUE; WHEN TOTAL AMOUNT OF $7,913.00 IS PAID BY DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF A DISMISSAL WILL BE FILED. IF TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE NOT MET, LANDLORD MAY, WITHIN A 48-HOUR PERIOD, ENTER JUDGMENT BY EX PARTE DECLARATION WITH NOTICE BY POSTING; NO STAYS OF EXECUTION TO BE ALLOWED FOR ANY UNPAID RENT DUE; ALL PAYMENTS ARE TO BE PAID BY CASHIER'S CHECK OR BY MONEY ORDER. ADDITIONALLY, THE $209.42 INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS TOWARD ARREARAGES MAY BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF MID-MONTH EACH MONTH. IF THERE IS A BREACH OF AGREEMENT BY DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT ALICIA BOOKER TO BE NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE AND NOT BY MAIL. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTATIVE MR. WILLIAM A. TALMAGE INDICATES TO THE COURT AND ON THE RECORD HE HEARS AND AGREES WITH THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT; DEFENDANT ALICIA BOOKER INDICATES TO THE COURT ON THE RECORD SHE HEARS AND AGREES WITH THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
